created.title: New shift
created.body: You were assigned a shift on {date}.

reassigned.title: Shift reassigned
reassigned.body: The shift on {date} is no longer assigned to you.

published.title: Schedule published
published.body: Your schedule for the week of {week} is now available.

resolved.title: Incident resolved
resolved.body: Your reported incident was resolved by your manager.

rejected.title: Incident rejected
rejected.body: Your reported incident was rejected by your manager.

approved.title: Request approved
approved.body: Your day-off request for {date} was approved.

rejected.title: Request rejected
rejected.body: Your day-off request for {date} was rejected by your manager.

approved.title: Request approved
approved.body: Your shift swap request was approved.

approvedTarget.title: Request approved
approvedTarget.body: The shift swap involving you was approved.

rejected.title: Request rejected
rejected.body: Your shift swap request was rejected.
